description: You are a Database Administrator performing lifecycle management on the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db). Flag 'dead stock' products that had no sales activity in the year 2013 by modifying the 'tracks' table schema to include a new column named 'IsArchived' (INTEGER, default 0). Update the 'IsArchived' column to 1 for all tracks that were not sold in 2013, based on the InvoiceDate in the invoices table. Create a summary report CSV at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/archival_summary.csv' with the columns GenreName, TotalTracks, ArchivedCount, ActiveCount, and ArchivalRate, sorted by ArchivalRate descending. Note that dates in SQLite are stored as strings (YYYY-MM-DD) and sales data links tracks through invoice_items to invoices.
